title: Allow all auth params to work with bud
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add creds and cert-dir params to 'buildah bud'.  I also updated the usage statements for the creds in all commands, I neglected to do that in my last PR.  Added test to the authentication test script and did a few minor touch ups there too.  This should also hopefully adddress #414 and #413.

comments.body: going to close and reopen to see if the Red Hat CI will run now.  Travis is green.
strange, i can't read Red Hat CI logs. just seeing "an internal error occured".
Ditto.  This happens from time to time.  Hopefully it will straighten itself out.
All Green!  I added a tests to the authenticate.bats file and removed a bad comment line from the Dockerfile that I make in the .sh file.
hmm, well it was all green, web cache bit me apparently.
Now it's really all green, including the new tests.

:pushpin: Commit 79bffd4 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 79bffd4d4232237379aacc52f8b6f0e3f80bf75b -->
All Green except Homu which had problems building the rpm test.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/9790b8977174088cbadf420f31026ed5654dc5a9.1517327998825796608/index.html)
